raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed a charge in the amount of {$160.00} transaction date XX/XX/year>. I received one letter from them saying they was investigating my claim and are working to resolve it as quickly as possible. Then I get another letting from them saying they completed the investigation and they credited the {$160.00} back to my acct. 

Now they are putting the charge back on my account again. I have sent them a copy of the letter they mailed to me saying they completed the investigation and credited my account. They are trying to come up now and say the company provided them with docs about the cancellation policy. This should have been provided to them before they closed the investigation on this dispute. Since they have already said they investigated and had put the credit on my account and it was ruled in my favor they should not be able to put this back on my account
